summary: 2026-06-05 20:53:13 PDT — The branch is docs-only and the BUG-D1/D2/D3 Done rows, CHANGELOG shipped-fix claims, OPS-1/2/3 rows, PR #2 tag, and 5225bdb merge reference otherwise check out. I found one remaining BACKLOG wording issue that keeps the emptied open bug section from reading cleanly against AC2.

findings.title: Open bug section still says shipped bugs are ready to frame
findings.claim: AC2 requires the open Skill-behavior-bugs section to read cleanly after BUG-D1/D2/D3 are removed. The diff replaces the open bug table with an “all shipped” note, but leaves the preceding text saying `these three are bundled and ready to /frame together`, which still describes BUG-D1/D2/D3 as future open work and contradicts the new Done entries.
findings.suggestion: Remove that two-line preface or rewrite it in past tense, e.g. `BUG-D1/D2/D3 were storied in workflow-skill-defects.story.md and shipped via PR #2 / 5225bdb; see Done.`
